CustomField.description: Captures the adjustment applied to the total of PBH amount (sum of individual assembly components), ensuring it stays within the PBH Minimum and PBH Maximum. It represents the difference added to meet the PBH Minimum or the excess amount capped at the PBH Maximum.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Captures the adjustment applied to the total of PBH amount (sum of individual assembly components), ensuring it stays within the PBH Minimum and PBH Maximum. It represents the difference added to meet the PBH Minimum or the excess amount capped at the PBH Maximum.
CustomField.label: PBH Rent Amount Adjustment($)
